posts.author: sandy459333 (Sandy Esraeil)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I’d love to see a way to do an account-wide default column setting.

What are you trying to achieve

For example, since a 2nd status column will populate into the priority column in “my work” if you do not have a priority column, it can create confusion so I’d love if all new boards would have a priority column.
